name: android-runner
description: Detects Android projects and provides a one-click build + install + launch flow via gradle and adb.

colors.description: Background color of the Android Runner status bar button.
Foreground color of the Android Runner status bar button.

androidRunner.gradleArgs.description: Extra arguments appended to the gradle build invocation (e.g. ["--info", "-x", "lint"]).

androidRunner.gradleTask.description: Gradle task to invoke when the Run button is clicked. Use installDebug (default) for incremental split-APK installs like Android Studio, or assembleDebug for build-only.

androidRunner.appModule.description: The Gradle module that produces the APK (e.g. 'app'). The task is scoped to :<appModule>:<task> to avoid ambiguity in multi-module projects.

androidRunner.buildFlavor.description: Product flavor to use (e.g. 'dev'). When set, the extension uses this flavor directly without prompting. Leave empty to be prompted on first run (the choice is saved automatically).

androidRunner.adbPath.description: Optional absolute path to adb. Leave empty to auto-detect from ANDROID_HOME / ANDROID_SDK_ROOT / PATH.

androidRunner.enableBuildCache.description: Pass --build-cache to Gradle so unchanged task outputs are reused across builds.

androidRunner.enableParallelBuild.description: Pass --parallel to Gradle so independent modules build concurrently.

androidRunner.enableConfigurationCache.description: Pass --configuration-cache to Gradle (8+). Dramatically speeds up incremental builds but requires project compatibility.

androidRunner.rememberDevice.description: Remember the last selected device and user profile, skipping the picker on subsequent runs if still connected.

androidRunner.forceStopBeforeLaunch.description: Force-stop the app before launching (like Android Studio) so the process restarts cleanly.

androidRunner.offlineMode.description: Pass --offline to Gradle, skipping dependency resolution. Speeds up builds when all dependencies are already cached.

androidRunner.gradleJvmArgs.description: JVM arguments for the Gradle daemon (set via GRADLE_OPTS). Only applied when GRADLE_OPTS is not already set in the environment.
